import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/TrainingCenter.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/TrainingCenter.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();

const mockModules = [
  {
    id: "mod-001",
    title: "Emergency Response Training",
    linkedPolicy: "Emergency Evacuation Procedures",
    difficulty: "intermediate",
    enrolled: 45,
    completed: 43,
    avgScore: 92,
    status: "published"
  },
  {
    id: "mod-002",
    title: "Data Privacy Fundamentals",
    linkedPolicy: "Data Privacy Guidelines",
    difficulty: "beginner",
    enrolled: 45,
    completed: 40,
    avgScore: 88,

    id: "mod-003",

    linkedPolicy: "Workplace Safety Standards",
    difficulty: "beginner",
    enrolled: 45,
    completed: 34,
    avgScore: 85,
    status: "published"
  }
];

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/TrainingCenter.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
